item.title: Hello, world!
item.description: This is my second attempt to write a blog. The first didn’t survive much. If I record correctly, I was able to post only one article about using Python with virtualenv. Actually, I am creating this blog as a personal space where I intend to post about technology and self development in general. I have some posts ideas already in mind, and I will try to write them over the weekends.

I’m a brazilian programmer born on the year of 1988 in the city of Rio de Janeiro. Although I have lived in many places and even in different countries, I’ve spent the most time living in Brazil. At the age of 20, I discovered my passion about computer programming when I was already at the university. The first programming assignment I had was to write a program in C. It was a very simple assignment, where I had to read two integers from the user input, and output the sum of those integers.
